name: Rose Matafeo
bio: Rose Matafeo is a New Zealand comedian, actor and writer known for her energetic, personal stand-up and her work in scripted comedy. She began performing as a teenager in Auckland and won the Billy T Award before breaking through internationally by winning the Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Show in 2018 for Horndog. She created and stars in the romantic comedy series Starstruck, which earned her a BAFTA nomination.

timeline.ev: Wins the Billy T Award in New Zealand
Wins the Edinburgh Comedy Award for Horndog
Starstruck premieres on BBC Three and HBO Max
Releases stand-up special On and On and On

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award for Best Show 2018
First New Zealander and first person of colour to win the solo award
